business_journey: Admin invites staff, enforces MFA, creates role/team and offboards a user with reassignment.
Sales receives public lead, duplicate check runs, acknowledgement sends once, SLA/owner action appears.
Customer replies during sequence; future messages stop and reply enters owner queue.
Sales qualifies/converts lead, advances opportunity with exit criteria, issues approved quote.
Opportunity wins once; onboarding, success and renewal records are created without duplication.
Onboarding requests customer input through portal, tracks blocker and completes with feedback.
Support email creates/threads ticket, meets/violates SLA fixtures, resolves, reopens and requests CSAT.
Low feedback opens recovery and suppresses promotional/advocacy communication.
Health worsens from support/feedback evidence; success plan and renewal risk path appear.
Import previews duplicates/errors, commits in chunks, releases safely and supports rollback report.
Portal user cannot access another organization’s ticket, file, onboarding item or survey.
Workflow simulation, activation, failure, dead-letter, replay and emergency stop are demonstrated.
AI recommendation shows reasons/abstains, accepts feedback and never performs prohibited action.
Manager dashboard totals reconcile to drilldown; controlled export escapes formula injection.
Backup is restored to staging and sampled customer history/files/permissions reconcile.
